sections.label: Hero Subtitle
sections.value: A Sacred Digital Sanctuary for Consciousness Exploration

sections.label: Hero Description
sections.value: PER-ANKH is a non-denominational, interfaith religious organization. At Per-Ankh we support the research, understanding and safe access of all Entheogenic plants, with a focus on CANNABIS & MAGIC MUSHROOMS

sections.label: Featured Quote
sections.value: The true Pioneers in the field of psychedelics have still yet to emerge from the shadows to share their own personal experiences

sections.label: About Paragraph 1
sections.value: We are a community of visionaries exploring the cutting-edge of awakening through psychedelics and sacred plant medicines.

sections.label: About Paragraph 2
sections.value: As worldwide interest in psychedelics expands, we are finding ourselves in the midst of a Psychedelic Renaissance and Global Shamanic Revival, an exciting intersection of groundbreaking science, cultural exchange, cutting-edge therapy, and game-changing personal development.

sections.label: About Paragraph 3
sections.value: At Per Ankh we provide deeply researched content about psychedelics – primarily natural psychedelics long-used by indigenous people around the world – and how you can work with them for healing and spiritual growth. We explore these topics through the multifaceted framework of science, culture, and spirituality.
